channel.title: Very Important People
channel.description: Latest releases from Very Important People on Dropout.tv

item.title: Spencer
item.description:
Vic interviews Spencer (Lisa Gilroy), a baby demon from Hell looking for a new dad.

Duration: 27:05

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, lisa gilroy

item.title: Last Looks: Candice
item.description:
Tamar Levine and Alex Perrone talk about how Nicole Byer transformed into Candice.

Duration: 04:24

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, tamar levine, alex perrone, nicole byer, behind the scenes

item.title: Candice
item.description:
Vic interviews Candice (Nicole Byer) and gets a lesson on teen culture.

Duration: 18:52

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, nicole byer

item.title: Last Looks: Greg and Charlotte Excitement
item.description:
Tamar Levine and Alex Perrone talk about how Brennan Lee Mulligan and Izzy Roland transformed into Greg and Charlotte Excitement.

Duration: 04:25

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, tamar levine, alex perrone, brennan lee mulligan, izzy roland, behind the scenes

item.title: Greg and Charlotte Excitement
item.description:
Vic interviews married wrestlers Greg & Charlotte Excitement (Brennan Lee Mulligan & Izzy Roland).

Duration: 24:59

Tags: Very Important People, vic michaelis, disguises, makeup, makeovers, interviews, improv, surprises, brennan lee mulligan, izzy roland
